hooks.command: f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); case "$f" in *server.js|*public/index.html) echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Prism docs check: this change may affect user-facing behavior. Review and update if needed: the Help modal + welcome card in public/index.html, README.md, and AGENTS.md (or CLAUDE.md).\"}}";; esac
